donation.text: Help keep Green Meteor running! Your support enables us to continue providing free HumHub modules.

hero.title: HumHub Modules Marketplace
hero.subtitle: Discover premium modules to enhance your HumHub community. Trusted by communities worldwide.

bazaar.title: Bazaar Marketplace Module
bazaar.desc: Install Bazaar on your HumHub network to browse, install, and update Green Meteor modules directly from your admin panel — no manual downloading required.
bazaar.note: Speak another language? Help translate Bazaar and make it accessible to users worldwide.
